# jubs.studio

> Design engineering solo studio by Julia Hoffmann Buratto (@jubscodes). Opinionated UI kits and AI design tools for developers and agents.

## About

jubs.studio is a design engineering solo studio focused on building opinionated developer tools that bridge design and code. Founded by Julia Hoffmann Buratto, a design engineer who builds UI component libraries and AI-powered design tooling.

## Projects

### CypherCN (UI Kit — Alpha)
Terminal-inspired component stylization for the shadcn ecosystem. 60+ components with phosphor glow effects, CRT scanlines, box-drawing borders, and monospace typography. Dark mode native. WCAG AA accessible.
- Install: `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add @cyphercn/button`
- Repository: https://github.com/jubscodes/cyphercn

### Get Shit Pretty — GSP (Dev Tool)
Design engineering for AI coding tools. A complete design pipeline that runs in your terminal — research, brand, design system, UI, specs, review, build, launch. Ships with 9 specialized agents and 11 skills. Works with Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, and Codex CLI.
- Install: `npx get-shit-pretty`
- Repository: https://github.com/jubscodes/get-shit-pretty
